answer: Partial result: AMER YoY ARR growth is tracking around +14% net of churn over the last 8 quarters. EMEA and APAC, plus the per-segment split, are still compiling against the data warehouse — poll this answer_id for the completed breakdown.

citations.snippet: Preliminary AMER rollup: SUM(arr) by fiscal quarter, net of churned-account ARR; remaining regions/segments queued.
